qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file read via path traversal in log download endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets path traversal in /api/logs and /api/download filename handling, not the scheduler POST/DELETE guest authorization bypass described by the advisory.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated arbitrary file deletion via path traversal in report removal endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets path traversal in /api/reportRemoveFile and fs.unlinkSync, not arbitrary scheduler mutation through missing guest checks in the scheduler API.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated remote code execution via script engine test endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets /api/runscript compiling attacker-supplied script.test code with Module._compile; it does not identify scheduler create/modify/delete or the missing guest-user guard patched in server/api/scheduler/index.js.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory patch blocks guest access to POST /api/scheduler and DELETE /api/scheduler by adding an isGuestUser check, while the qualifying findings cover unrelated path traversal and /api/runscript code execution paths.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-c869-jx4c-q5fc describes unauthenticated remote arbitrary scheduler create/modify/delete in FUXA 1.2.8 through 1.2.10, including deployments with secureEnabled=true.
Referenced patch PR #2174 adds guest-user authorization checks to server/api/scheduler/index.js for POST /api/scheduler and DELETE /api/scheduler.
path-traversal-file-read reports single-pass ../ stripping in server/api/diagnose/index.js and server/api/command/index.js.
path-traversal-report-remove reports unsanitized path.join plus fs.unlinkSync in server/dist/reports.service.js.
rce-script-engine reports attacker-controlled script.code reaching Module._compile through POST /api/runscript.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No qualifying finding matched the advisory scheduler mutation and guest authorization root cause, so Tier1, Tier2, and Tier3 are not applicable.
